name: Nemotron Nano 4B Instruct
description: NVIDIA Nemotron-Mini 4B Instruct — compact, efficient LLM optimized for instruction-following and reasoning. Fits in 8 GB VRAM. Ideal for high-throughput, cost-sensitive deployments.

params.prompt: You are a helpful assistant. What is the capital of Saudi Arabia?

model_cache.behavior: Hot cache — small model (~8 GB) kept permanently pinned. Lowest cold-start latency of all LLM templates. Suitable for instant-tier pre-bake.

params.prompt: Classify the sentiment of this review: 'The GPU compute service was fast and reliable.'

tier_notes: Instant tier candidate — small model footprint enables pre-baking into provider Docker image for zero cold-start. Recommended for providers with 8 GB VRAM.
